residual_risks: conflictCopy.content is displayed via `.replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '')` string substitution (not innerHTML) so XSS via injected tags is neutralized. JavaScript-URI strings like `javascript:alert(1)` are displayed as inert text. Safe.
The conflict resolution write (saveNote) goes through syncableWrite which enqueues the change. No direct DB mutation bypasses the normal auth/RLS path. Safe.
conflictSourceId is stored as TEXT (not UUID). If this field is later used for device attribution or access control, ensure validation is added at that time.
